category_sources: Official SourceForge project page categorizes it as hardware and describes it as tools for flashing Rockchip devices.
source_facts.description says rkflashtool provides tools for flashing Rockchip devices.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page title is rkflashtool.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge Code README contains build and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project Code tab exposes the project Git tree.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project page lists command-line interface and C implementation details.
